name: Cyrene
desc: A meteor streaks across the night sky, stirring ripples in the river of life, shimmering with thirteen hues.\nDaughter of Aedes Elysiae, nurturer of the Chrysos Heir of "███," plants the Seed of Memory, letting yesterday's flowers bloom in tomorrow\n—"Now, let's write a different kind of poem together♪"

1.name: Epics, Born on a Blank Slate
1.desc: When Demiurge triggers the Memosprite Skill "Ode to Ego" during the use of "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and increases the number of bounces for this attack by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

2.name: A Tomorrow in Thirteen Shades
2.desc: When entering combat, additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s). For every 1 different ally character that gains the Memosprite Skill <u>buff</u> from Demiurge, the DMG multiplier for the <u>True DMG</u> dealt by ally targets via the Skill's Zone increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

3.name: By Thy Being, As I've Written
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Please Write On, With a Smile
4.desc: After every 1 use of "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes" by Demiurge, the Bounce DMG multiplier for the triggered Memosprite Skill "Ode to Ego" increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> in the current battle, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> times.

5.name: Gaze, Steeped in Yesterbloom
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Remembrance, Sung in Ripples ♪
6.desc: When Cyrene uses Ultimate for the first time, all allies <u>advance action</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Each time Demiurge triggers the Memosprite Skill "Ode to Ego" during the use of "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," gains the following effects based on the number of times it has been triggered in the current battle:\n1 time: When Demiurge is on the field, reduces all enemy targets' DEF by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.\n2 times and more: All allies <u>advance action</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

141501.name: Lo, Hope Takes Flight!
141501.desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to one designated enemy.
141501.simple_desc: Gains "Recollection" and deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

141502.name: Bloom, Elysium of Beyond
141502.desc: Gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and deploys a Zone that lasts for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns. The Zone's duration decreases by 1 at the start of Cyrene's every turn. While the Zone lasts, for each instance of DMG dealt by all ally targets, deals 1 additional instance of <u>True DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG. When Cyrene is <u>downed</u>, the Zone will also be dispelled.
141502.simple_desc: Gains "Recollection" and deploys a Zone. Additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>True DMG</u></color> after all ally targets deal DMG.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

141503.name: Verse ◦ Vow ∞
141503.desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Demiurge, causes it to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>, and activates all teammates' Ultimate. Then, enters the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state. Enhances Basic ATK to "To Love and Tomorrow ♪" and can only use this Basic ATK. Increases Cyrene's and Demiurge's CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, and deploys the Zone effect from Skill with no duration limit.\nCan only be used once per battle. Demiurge's initial Max HP equals to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Cyrene's Max HP.
141503.simple_desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Demiurge, causes it to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>, and <color=#f29e38ff>activates all teammates' Ultimate</color>. Then, enters the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state and gains Enhanced Basic ATK. Increases Cyrene's and Demiurge's CRIT Rate, and deploys the Zone effect from Skill with no duration limit.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

141504.name: Hearts Gather as One
141504.desc: When combat begins or after Cyrene takes action, other ally characters under any state and their memosprites gain "Future." When ally targets with "Future" take action, consumes "Future" to grant Cyrene <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s). When Cyrene has <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points, can activate Ultimate and dispel all <u>debuffs</u> on her. When she has <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points during the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state, can activate Ultimate. After reaching the maximum, it can overflow by up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points. While Cyrene is on the field, increases DMG dealt by all ally targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>.
141504.simple_desc: When combat begins or after Cyrene takes action, teammates and their memosprites gain "Future." When ally targets with "Future" take action, Cyrene gains "Recollection." While Cyrene is on the field, increases DMG dealt by ally targets.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

141506.name: Attack
141506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

141507.name: Peace at West Wind's End
141507.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s) around the character. Enemies within this Special Dimension enter the "This Moment, Forever" state. While in this state, enemies will cease all actions. Ally characters within this Special Dimension have <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> increased movement speed. After entering combat within the duration, deploys the Skill's Zone. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
141507.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension around the character. Enemies within this dimension enter the "This Moment, Forever" state while ally characters within this dimension have increased movement speed. After entering combat, deploys the Skill's Zone.

141508.name: To Love and Tomorrow ♪
141508.desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to one designated enemy. Then, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to all enemies.\n"To Love and Tomorrow ♪" cannot recover Skill Points.
141508.simple_desc: Gains "Recollection" and deals Ice DMG to all enemies.

141514.name: <unbreak>Reunion at</unbreak> <unbreak>First Sight</unbreak>
141514.desc: Enables Demiurge to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>.
141514.simple_desc: Enables Demiurge to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

141519.name: Attack
141519.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1.point_desc: When a teammate's memosprite is summoned, it gains "Future." "Future" held by the memosprite won't be consumed.

When there are 1/2/3 <u>Chrysos Heir</u> or Remembrance characters (excluding Cyrene) in the team, Cyrene gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) respectively at the start of combat.

10000025.name: Chrysos Heir
10000025.desc: Cyrene, Tribbie, Cerydra, Evernight, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Hysilens, Hyacine, Phainon, Anaxa, Aglaea, Mydei, Castorice, Cipher, Trailblazer (Remembrance).

1.point_desc: When Cyrene's SPD is <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or higher, increases all allies' DMG dealt by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. Then, for every 1 SPD that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases Cyrene's and Demiurge's Ice <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Up to a maximum of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1141501.name: Minuet of Blooms and Plumes
1141501.desc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Demiurge's Max HP.
1141501.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies.

1141502.name: This Ode, to All Lives
1141502.desc: Applies a <u>buff</u> to one designated ally character. When the character is a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, the target gains a <color=#f9b0f0><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarCyrene id=0 width=1 height=1>special</unbreak> effect</u></color>. When the character is not a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, increases the target's DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turns. This effect also applies on memosprites.
1141502.simple_desc: Applies a <u>buff</u> to one ally character. When the character is a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, the target gains a <color=#f9b0f0><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarCyrene id=0 width=1 height=1>special</unbreak> effect</u></color>. When the character is not a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, increases the target's DMG dealt. This effect also applies on memosprites.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

10000025.name: Chrysos Heir
10000025.desc: Cyrene, Tribbie, Cerydra, Evernight, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Hysilens, Hyacine, Phainon, Anaxa, Aglaea, Mydei, Castorice, Cipher, Trailblazer (Remembrance).

1141503.name: Waiting, In Every Past
1141503.desc: Demiurge's SPD remains at 0, and it will not appear on the Action Order. While on the field, it is considered as <u>Out-of-Bounds</u>. When Cyrene's HP percentage changes, Demiurge's HP percentage will also change accordingly. While Demiurge is on the field, Cyrene's and Demiurge's Max HP increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Demiurge uses abilities, decreases the duration of all <u>Continuous Effects</u> on this unit by 1.
1141503.simple_desc: When changes occur on Cyrene's HP, Demiurge's HP will also change accordingly. While Demiurge is on the field, Cyrene's Max HP increases.

10000022.name: Continuous Effect
10000022.desc: Includes buffs, debuffs, and other effects.

10000024.name: Out-of-Bounds
10000024.desc: Neither allies nor enemies can actively select Out-of-Bounds units.

1141505.name: "Hello, World ♪"
1141505.desc: When Demiurge is summoned, dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> from all allies.
1141505.simple_desc: When summoned, dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> from all allies.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1141513.name: Ode to Genesis
1141513.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Trailblazer (Remembrance), increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s ATK by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Demiurge's Max HP, and increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s CRIT Rate by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Demiurge's CRIT Rate. This effect also applies to Mem. After Trailblazer (Remembrance) uses Enhanced Basic ATK in this battle, Demiurge immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes." If the target was defeated before this ability is used, it will be used on newly appeared enemy targets instead.
1141513.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Trailblazer (Remembrance), increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s ATK and CRIT Rate. This effect also applies to Mem. After Trailblazer (Remembrance) uses Enhanced Basic ATK, Demiurge immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

1141514.name: Ode to Romance
1141514.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Aglaea, causes Aglaea to gain "Romance" and immediately stacks Garmentmaker's Memosprite Talent's SPD Boost effect to its upper limit. After Aglaea or Garmentmaker uses an attack, consumes "Romance" and regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. Increases DMG dealt by Aglaea and Garmentmaker by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, and ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the targets' DEF, lasting until Aglaea exits the "Supreme Stance" state.
1141514.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Aglaea, immediately stacks Aglaea's Memosprite Talent's SPD Boost effect to its upper limit. After Aglaea or Garmentmaker uses an attack, regenerates Energy. Increases DMG dealt by Aglaea and Garmentmaker, and ignores targets' DEF.

1141515.name: Ode to Passage
1141515.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Tribbie, causes DMG dealt by Tribbie to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of enemies' DEF. When Tribbie launches Follow-Up ATK and triggers the <u>Additional DMG</u> from Tribbie's Zone, it further deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of Additional DMG.
1141515.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Tribbie, causes DMG dealt by Tribbie to ignore enemies' DEF. When Tribbie launches Follow-Up ATK and triggers the <u>Additional DMG</u> from Tribbie's Zone, it further deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> instance(s) of Additional DMG.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1141516.name: Ode to Strife
1141516.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> inflicted on him. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses 1 instance of "Godslayer Be God" without consuming Charge. Mydei's CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> during this attack. If the target gets defeated before the use, then it will target the newly arriving enemy targets instead. If Mydei is not in the "Vendetta" state, then <u>advances Mydei's action</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
1141516.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses "Godslayer Be God" and increases his CRIT DMG. If he is not in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei's <u>action advances</u>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1141517.name: Ode to Life and Death
1141517.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Castorice, "Newbud" can overflow up to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. When summoning Netherwing, consumes all overflowing "Newbud." For every 1% overflow amount consumed, increases the multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f2]%</unbreak></color> for the DMG dealt when this summoned Netherwing triggers the ability effect of its Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins." If there are <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> enemy target(s) or fewer on the field when summoned, the DMG multiplier additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f2]%</unbreak></color>.
1141517.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Castorice, "Newbud" can overflow. When summoning Netherwing, consumes all overflowing "Newbud." Based on the overflow amount, increases the multiplier for the DMG dealt when this summoned Netherwing triggers the ability effect of its Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins." If there are fewer than a certain number of enemy targets, the DMG multiplier additionally increases.

1141518.name: Ode to Reason
1141518.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Anaxa, recovers <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies and enables Anaxa to take action immediately. Skill has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more instances of DMG, lasting for 1 turn. The next time Anaxa uses Basic ATK or Skill, he gains "True Knowledge": All Erudition characters have their ATK increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> and their dealt Skill DMG increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting until the start of Anaxa's next turn.
1141518.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Anaxa, recovers Skill Point(s) for allies and enables Anaxa to take action immediately. Skill has more instances of DMG. All Erudition characters have increased ATK and Skill DMG dealt.

1141519.name: Ode to Sky
1141519.desc: When Demiurge uses Memosprite Skill, causes Hyacine to gain 2 stacks of "Ode to Sky." When used on Hyacine, regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Energy for Hyacine. When Hyacine has "Ode to Sky" and is providing healing, additionally increases the amount to be included in the tally of Little Ica's Memosprite Skill by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the current healing amount. After Hyacine uses Skill/Ultimate, consumes 1 stack of "Ode to Sky."
1141519.simple_desc: When Demiurge uses Memosprite Skill, enables Hyacine to gain 2 stacks of "Ode to Sky." When used on Hyacine, regenerates Energy for Hyacine. When Hyacine has "Ode to Sky" and is providing healing, additionally increases the amount to be included in the healing tally of Little Ica's Memosprite Skill.

1141520.name: Ode to Trickery
1141520.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Cipher, increases the DMG dealt by Cipher by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, decreases the DEF of the "Patron" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> and decreases the DEF of all other enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.
1141520.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Cipher, increases the DMG dealt by Cipher, and decreases the enemy targets' DEF. The DEF of the "Patron" further decreases.

1141521.name: Ode to Worldbearing
1141521.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After it is used on Phainon, Phainon gains <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> "Coreflame" as well as "Eternal Ignition" when Transforming. When Transforming, if "Coreflame" exceeds <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>, for each point in excess, Khaslana's CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>, up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>. While "Eternal Ignition" persists, increases Khaslana's CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>. After the <u>extra turns</u> are depleted, the Transformation does not end, and all of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u> get refreshed and <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak> "<u>Scourge</u>" is granted. At the start of <u>extra turns</u>, Khaslana consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of his current HP. After using an attack, deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instances of <u>Additional DMG</u>, with each instance dealing Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK to one random enemy.
1141521.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After it is used on Phainon, Phainon immediately gains "Coreflame," increasing Khaslana's CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG. After the <u>extra turns</u> are depleted, the Transformation does not end, <u>"Scourge"</u> is granted, and all of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u> get refreshed. At the start of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u>, loses current HP. After attacking, deals Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> to random enemies.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10014081.name: Scourge
10014081.desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

10014082.name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

1141522.name: Ode to Ocean
1141522.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Hysilens, Hysilens gains "Flowing Warmth." After Hysilens uses an attack, consumes "Flowing Warmth" and regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for this unit. In this battle, increases the DMG dealt by Hysilens by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Hysilens uses Basic ATK/Skill to attack enemies, causes all the DoT currently applied on the attacked enemy targets to immediately produce DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.
1141522.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Hysilens, Hysilens gains "Flowing Warmth." After Hysilens uses an attack, consumes "Flowing Warmth" and regenerates Energy for this unit. Increases the DMG dealt by Hysilens. After Hysilens uses Basic ATK/Skill to attack enemies, causes all the DoT currently applied on the attacked enemy targets to immediately produce one instance of DMG.

1141523.name: Ode to Law
1141523.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After using on Cerydra, increases the CRIT DMG of the character with "Military Merit" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After <u>Coup de Main</u> ends, Cerydra immediately gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge.
1141523.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After using on Cerydra, increases the CRIT DMG of the character with "Military Merit." After <u>Coup de Main</u> ends, Cerydra immediately gains Charge.

10000023.name: Coup de Main
10000023.desc: Copy and immediately use the ability about to be used, then use the original ability.\nCoup de Main won't trigger Coup de Main again.

1141524.name: Ode to Time
1141524.desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle.</color> After it is used on Evernight, increases the DMG dealt when Evey uses the Memosprite Skill "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Evernight uses Skill/Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Memoria." The CRIT DMG boost effect provided by the Skill is further increased by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evernight's CRIT DMG.
1141524.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle.</color> After it is used on Evernight, increases the DMG dealt when Evey uses the Memosprite Skill "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew." After Evernight uses Skill/Ultimate, additionally gains "Memoria." The CRIT DMG boost effect provided by the Skill is further increased.

1141525.name: Ode to Earth
1141525.desc: When Demiurge uses Memosprite Skill, grants "Ode to Earth" to Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, and enables the next <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> attack(s) of "Souldragon" to deal <u>Additional DMG</u> of the Bondmate's Type, equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Bondmate's Shield Effect. When Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae holds "Ode to Earth," the "Bondmate" deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG. When used on Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, advances Souldragon's action by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Souldragon's next action gains the enhancement effect of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate and the Shield Effect provided by Souldragon is <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its original Shield Effect. Does not consume the enhancement number of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate.
1141525.simple_desc: When Demiurge uses Memosprite Skill, "Souldragon" deals <u>Additional DMG</u> after attacking and Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae gains "Ode to Earth": The "Bondmate" deals increased DMG. When used on Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, advances Souldragon's action, and enables Souldragon's next action to gain the enhancement effect of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate and increases the multiplier of the Shield provided.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1141526.name: Ode to Ego
1141526.desc: For every 1 different teammate (i.e., excluding Demiurge) from whom Cyrene has gained "Recollection," additionally deals 1 instance of Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Demiurge's Max HP to one random enemy when Demiurge uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes." After Cyrene uses Ultimate or when Demiurge is summoned, Demiurge immediately gains 1 "Story." When "Story" reaches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, Demiurge consumes all "Story" points to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically use "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."
1141526.simple_desc: For every 1 different teammate (i.e., excluding Demiurge) from whom Cyrene has gained "Recollection," additionally deals 1 instance of DMG to one random enemy when Demiurge uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes." After Cyrene uses Ultimate a certain number of times, Demiurge immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.
